title: ProjectMembershipCompact
description: This object describes a team or a user's membership to a project including their level of access (Admin, Editor, Commenter, or Viewer).

gid.description: Globally unique identifier of the resource, as a string.

resource_type.description: The base type of this resource.

parent.description: [Opt In](/docs/inputoutput-options). The project the user is a member of.

member.description: Member can be a user or a team.

access_level.description: Whether the member has admin, editor, commenter, or viewer access to the project.
